channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: BMW Introduces Dolby Atmos Sound To New 7 Series
item.description: Its iX3 Long Wheelbase model also set to get Dolby’s premium surround sound audio solution.

item.title: Meet The Eel That Generates 800V — A Biologist Explains How It Doesn’t Electrocute Itself
item.description: At first glance, the electric eel’s abilities feel implausible. But upon a closer inspection, we find a precise, evolved system built on familiar cell...

item.title: What Is an LLC Taxed as a Sole Proprietorship?
item.description: Discover how an LLC taxed as a sole proprietorship affects your business finances. Learn about tax implications, benefits, and how to manage your LLC ...

item.title: Quit Whining. Pluto’s Not A Planet, An Astrophysicist Explains
item.description: The head of NASA says maybe Pluto is a planet after all. He is wrong because Pluto is part of the rest of the solar system
